title: GitHub API 403 rate limits fixture registry without GITHUB_TOKEN
description: The fixture registry's GitHub API calls to aspose-cells/Aspose.Cells-for-.NET:Examples/Data are rate-limited without GITHUB_TOKEN. This causes the registry to fall back to path-only registration. With GITHUB_TOKEN set, the registry should function normally.
impact: Fixture registry returns only 1 entry instead of full fixture list. Pipeline works around it with generated fixtures.
recommendation: Document GITHUB_TOKEN requirement in MEMORY.md. Optionally add caching to reduce API calls.
